title: sonchus berteroanus
intro: Sonchus berteroanus is a species of thistle native to the island of Guadeloupe in the Caribbean. It is a type of thistle in the dandelion tribe and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sonchus berteroanus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
